name: TensorOrbit-JARVIS-v2 full-O(3) external tensor-oracle qualification v2
purpose: Qualify two independently pinned tensor predictors against a source-pinned, formula-disjoint v2 target artifact whose polar rank-three targets obey full O(3) crystal point-group compatibility. This is not a GaugeFlow generation protocol.

oracles.architecture_class: architecture-distinct pinned e3nn SE(3)-Transformer with Cartesian rank-three head

qualification.ensemble_rule: Both models must meet their separately committed matched v2 qualification criteria before either may be used in a real-tensor fidelity evaluation. PiezoJet is not the primary oracle.

activation_rule: Only after this oracle qualification is complete may a separately versioned real piezo v2 tensor-orbit-fidelity protocol be proposed. Relaxation and DFPT remain later frozen-ranking stages.
